name: Malicious Base64 in Registry
notes:
This rule detects registry write modifications where an adversary attempts to hide encoded commands.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Environment Variable Has Been Registered
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of user-specific or system-wide environement variables via the registry. Which contains suspicious commands and strings


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches (("Registry Value Data" MATCHES '^(JAB|TVq|SUVY|SQBFAF|SQBuAH|PAA|cwB|aWV4|aQBlA|R2V0|dmFy|dgBhA|dXNpbm|H4sIA|Y21k|IAB|cABhAH|Qzpc|Yzpc|UEs)') OR ((LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?powershell.*' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?pwsh.*') AND ("Registry Value Data" MATCHES '.*(JAB|TVq|SUVY|SQBFAF|SQBuAH|PAA|cwB|aWV4|aQBlA|R2V0|dmFy|dgBhA|dXNpbm|H4sIA|Y21k|IAB|cABhAH|Qzpc|Yzpc|UEs).*'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malicious Base64 in Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches (("Registry Value Data" MATCHES '^(JAB|TVq|SUVY|SQBFAF|SQBuAH|PAA|cwB|aWV4|aQBlA|R2V0|dmFy|dgBhA|dXNpbm|H4sIA|Y21k|IAB|cABhAH|Qzpc|Yzpc|UEs)') OR ((LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?powershell.*' OR LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '.*?pwsh.*') AND ("Registry Value Data" MATCHES '.*(JAB|TVq|SUVY|SQBFAF|SQBuAH|PAA|cwB|aWV4|aQBlA|R2V0|dmFy|dgBhA|dXNpbm|H4sIA|Y21k|IAB|cABhAH|Qzpc|Yzpc|UEs).*'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Malicious Base64 in Registry
Event description: Detects registry write modifications where an adversary attempts to hide encoded commands
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
